description: Style NoteIf you're a denim person, then these jeggings from wrangler are perfect for you. With a low waist and great slim Fit, this pair looks on trend and stays comfortable all day. Team this with feminine tops and stilletos for a chic look.Product DetailsBlue jeggings with a patch pocket on the right, two patch pockets on the back with embroidery, brand tab appliqued on the right pocket on the front, loops on the waist and has a metal zipper and button closureMaterial and CareCotton/spandexMachine wash cold separately using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wringWarm ironSize and FitSlim fit low waistThe model (height 5'8" and waist 26") is wearing a size 28
